news.t: Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2025
Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2024
Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2023
Commercial real-estate worries weigh down property ETFs — but a ‘durable' corner holds up relatively well
Simplify Launches No K-1 Actively Managed Commodity Strategy ETF (HARD)

overview.description: The Simplify Commodities Strategy No K-1 ETF (HARD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad market commodities. The fund is an actively managed ETF that targets futures contracts on hard commodities, making use of long/short models, anticipated to perform positivelyduring inflationary periods. HARD was launched on Mar 27, 2023 and is issued by Simplify.

data.title: Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2025
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify Asset Management announces that it expects to deliver capital gains distributions across ten ETFs.

data.title: Simplify Launches No K-1 Actively Managed Commodity Strategy ETF (HARD)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify launches HARD, designed as long-only commodity replacement, with enhancements of systematic long/short managed futures strategy & no K-1.
